design_philosophy: Authority, clarity, and function-first. The UI must be highly legible and data-dense, employing the 'Control Room' bento grid pattern. Avoid generic SaaS look by utilizing brutalist-inspired 1px solid borders, zero decorative shadows, and high contrast monochromatic structures with color reserved strictly for statuses (success/error/warning).

rules: No Inter or Roboto for headings.
Metrics and KPIs must use large, bold, tightly tracked typography.
Labels must be uppercase with wide tracking for optical separation.
Text contrast must meet APCA or WCAG AA (4.5:1) minimum.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (Dashboards/Analytics)
rules: Use dense, compact spacing for tables and lists (p-2 to p-4).
Cards and widgets must have strict 1px solid borders (border-zinc-300).
Use F-pattern scanning layout with a left sidebar.
Every pixel utilized in the bento grid: use h-full to stretch children.

components.surfaces: Grid Borders: Flat solid backgrounds with sharp 1px borders. Max border-radius: 4px (rounded-sm) or 0px (rounded-none).
components.buttons: High contrast black/white or strong accent blue. No soft shadows. Solid color changes on hover.
components.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned data, right-aligned numbers. 1px bottom border per row. Alternating row colors are banned; use pure white with hover states.
components.inputs: Shadcn based, but override to 0px or 4px radius with strong border focus rings.
components.navigation: Left vertical sidebar, highly structured. Selected state highlighted with a thick left border or solid background.

rules: Use quick transitions (150ms) for hover states, no bouncy spring animations.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight, avoid Duotone for data-heavy apps to keep it sharp and readable.

user_avatar.description: Professional avatar for user profile in the dashboard header/sidebar.

brand_logo.description: Minimal car logo to use as the CRM branding in the sidebar/login page.

instructions_to_main_agent: ALL text and UI copy MUST be in Ukrainian (e.g., 'Ліди', 'Клієнти', 'Угоди', 'Налаштування').
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for layout structure but heavily customize Shadcn UI components for complex interactions.

CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' attributes to ALL interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tables, and key informational nodes using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='create-lead-button', data-testid='leads-table').
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' for the dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Stretch children using h-full.
Override Shadcn default styles to match the Swiss High-Contrast theme: remove excessive border-radius (max rounded-sm), remove shadows, enforce 1px solid borders.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Always use Shadcn Dropdown/Select and Calendar.
Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react' to install the required icon library.
Make sure to use .js files for React components as required.
